overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a flying vehicle navigating through a dense, neon-lit futuristic city at night. The vehicle weaves between skyscrapers adorned with holographic billboards and neon signs, transitioning from open commercial districts to narrow building corridors and back.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon-lit commercial district with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: flying hovercar steadily through wide city canyon between glass skyscrapers, maintaining altitude while approaching the commercial district center

entered.detail: massive holographic billboard displaying 'KIROSHI' with Japanese text beneath it, mounted on a skyscraper
illuminated pink cherry blossom trees glowing with artificial neon light between buildings
tall modern glass facade tower with reflective windows
elevated train tracks running between buildings at mid-height level
tall cylindrical structure with red neon lighting and circular symbol

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a sweeping aerial view of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, dominated by the massive KIROSHI billboard and neon-illuminated cherry blossom trees. The vehicle flies steadily through a wide corridor between glass skyscrapers, passing elevated railway tracks and various holographic advertisements in a densely packed commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow building corridor with overhead signage and industrial infrastructure

events.description: vehicle enters narrow corridor between red and white striped buildings, passing under the large HOテル sign
vehicle banks sharply left and descends slightly to navigate a tight turn between close building walls

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through tight spaces between skyscrapers, banking left and right to avoid collisions with building walls and infrastructure

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with 'HO テル' in blue and pink neon letters mounted over the corridor
neon sign depicting pink lips glowing on the left building facade
tall building with distinctive horizontal red and white stripes
exposed metal beams and girders connecting buildings across the narrow gap
elevated metal walkway with railings spanning between buildings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow corridor between towering red and white striped buildings, passing under the prominent HOテル sign. The space becomes increasingly confined with metal support girders and catwalks visible overhead, requiring sharp banking maneuvers to navigate the tight turns and avoid collision with the surrounding architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark narrow alley between high-rise buildings with industrial elements

events.description: ambient light drops significantly as vehicle enters deeply shadowed corridor between tall buildings with minimal neon illumination
exits dark narrow passage into more open area with visible helipad and returning city lights

agents.ego_description: descending through a dark maze of buildings while making sharp turns to find the exit corridor, adjusting altitude to clear obstacles

entered.detail: skyscraper with dark tinted glass windows reflecting minimal light
rooftop landing pad marked with red perimeter lights visible in the distance
modern building with curved glass facade and horizontal window lines
grey concrete high-rise with regular window grid pattern
large vertical billboard displaying a woman's face in purple tones

segments.scene_description: Navigating through a dark, narrow canyon between buildings where neon lights give way to deep shadow. The vehicle descends slightly while threading between dark glass towers and concrete structures, eventually emerging into a more open area where a helipad with red lights becomes visible on a nearby rooftop alongside curved modern architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown approach with landing platforms and rooftop structures

events.description: vehicle reduces speed significantly and aligns with landing platform approach vector

agents.ego_description: slowing down while approaching a landing platform on a high-rise building, adjusting orientation to prepare for docking

entered.detail: elevated landing pad with illuminated markings on top of a skyscraper
tall narrow digital billboard displaying animated content
office building with regular grid of illuminated windows
tall narrow structure with antennae and warning lights

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the narrow corridors into a more open downtown area, passing by a helipad and large vertical billboards. It slows down as it approaches a landing platform on a high-rise building, with the city skyline visible in the background and various rooftop structures including air conditioning units and control towers coming into close view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis, transitioning from wide commercial boulevards into claustrophobic architectural canyons before emerging at a high-rise landing site. It begins with a sweeping flight through a dense district dominated by the massive KIROSHI billboard and glowing cherry blossom trees, gliding past elevated railway tracks and glass skyscrapers. As the vehicle pushes forward, the environment tightens into a narrow corridor of red and white striped buildings and overhead metal girders, forcing sharp banking maneuvers beneath a prominent hotel sign. The scene then shifts into a dark, shadowed canyon of concrete and glass where the neon glow fades, before the camera descends slightly and breaks out toward a rooftop helipad marked by red lights. Finally, the vehicle exits the confinement into an open downtown vista, slowing its pace as it approaches a high-rise landing platform surrounded by industrial rooftop equipment against the sprawling city skyline.
